sections.label: Automated regression
sections.summary: The definitive B-6 gate passed 115 unit, 6 desktop, 34 Companion, and 37 browser tests with 13 intentional WebKit mutation skips; all 11 SQLite migrations, seed preservation, production build, and restart checks passed.

sections.label: Reliability
sections.summary: Only synthetic production-engine fixtures exist; real locked pilot corpora are absent.

sections.label: Hardware and performance
sections.summary: CPU synthetic timing exists; required provider/display/game-impact/long-run matrix is absent.

sections.label: Installer
sections.summary: Local NSIS build and packaged native-capture smoke pass; clean-machine installation and removal evidence remains open.

sections.label: Signing
sections.summary: Signing pipeline can be implemented, but no production certificate or signed artifact exists.

sections.label: Updater and rollback
sections.summary: Integrity, active-session interlock, activation, interruption recovery, and rollback pass automated tests; clean-machine update evidence remains open.

sections.label: Security review
sections.summary: Existing boundaries have automated tests; independent B-6 review remains required.

sections.label: Privacy review
sections.summary: Local non-retention defaults are tested; independent B-6 validation remains required.

sections.label: External usability
sections.summary: No external creator, uninvolved Player, or uninvolved Captain study has run.

sections.label: Documentation
sections.summary: Architecture, reliability, hardware, installation/update, security/privacy, distribution, usability, runbook, release notes, role guides, evidence, ADRs, and the completion report are present.

knownLimitations: CPU_CLASSICAL is the only active vision provider.
No public release trust claim is permitted.
Synthetic fixtures are not Sea of Thieves field evidence.
